name: Chien Wei Precise Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chien Wei Precise Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells precise molding and measuring machines, and machine tools worldwide. Its products include 2D/3D precise measuring instruments, precision JIG grinders, machining centers, vertical grinding machines, IC-semiconductor special accessories, trimming and forming products, ultra-precision optics, and DVD molds. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
